SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUGHES, BRIGID MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $338.80 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $388.80, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3387.98 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE ONLY; AND ATTRIBUTES 90% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO TO THE DRIVER OF PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
